title: Define ConfigLoadError variants
scenario: A configuration loader can fail for different reasons. Start with an enum that keeps those reasons programmatic.
instructions: Define ConfigLoadError with MissingEnvironment, InvalidPort, and FileRead variants.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps config-err-enum explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
